headline: Stable negative sentiment (score: -87.5)
key_insights: Optimism trending up 215% over 7 days (strong momentum)
sentiment_commentary:
• Frustrations dominate with 149 quotes at 100.4 points, driven by an overwhelming 111 strong-intensity comments - people are really fired up today.

• This frustration level sits in the upper half of the 88-day range but well below the peak of 163, indicating elevated but not extreme anger.

• Fears dropped sharply from yesterday's 5.2 to -9.5 while optimism turned slightly positive after yesterday's negativity.
methodology: See METHODOLOGY.md. Scores use z-score normalization with empirically-derived intensity weights from analytics_config.yaml. Alerts at |z| >= threshold (configurable, default 2.0 for p < 0.05).
